title: Evaluation Budget Decision
description: Governed decision artifact produced by the BT Evaluation Budget Governor. Consumes an evaluation_monitor_summary and enforces a deterministic policy that controls system behavior.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this budget decision.

summary_id.description: The summary_id of the evaluation_monitor_summary that drove this decision.

status.description: Budget health status derived from the monitor summary.

system_response.description: Governed system action to take based on the budget status.

reasons.description: Human-readable explanations for the budget status and system response.

triggered_thresholds.description: Names of policy thresholds that were triggered in this evaluation.

required_actions.description: Specific actions that must be taken in response to this decision.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this decision was created.
